example: I am still experiencing some discomfort in my lower back.
Let me check your vitals to see if there's anything we can do.
zh: 生命徵象，指心跳、血壓等重要生理指標
ja: バイタルサイン（生命兆候）

example: I will administer a mild pain reliever for you.
zh: 止痛藥，緩解疼痛的藥物

example: The nurse will administer the medication shortly.
The doctor will have a better idea after the next assessment.
zh: 評估，對病情或狀況的判斷

example: The physical therapist will help with your mobility.
We are here to support you on your journey to recovery.
Your vitals seem stable at the moment.
It was a bit challenging with the discomfort but I managed to rest.
Take this with a sip of water.
